ncs_standard_definition.description_short: Designs and develops innovative biotechnological solutions for agricultural crop improvement, disease resistance, and yield enhancement.
ncs_standard_definition.description_detailed: Biotechnologists in agriculture apply genetic engineering, molecular biology, and biotechnology principles to develop new crop varieties, improve crop yields, and enhance disease resistance. They work with plant breeders, geneticists, and other scientists to design and implement experiments, analyze data, and interpret results.

first_stepper.description: Standard route for a high school student.

choice_maker.description: Has a generic degree, needs a bridge.

future_builder.description: Already in the sector, looking to advance.
future_builder.prerequisite_experience: 2 years as Research Assistant in Agricultural Biotechnology

problem_solver_uturn.description: Switching from an unrelated field. No degree required.
portfolio_proof_required: Research project on crop improvement using biotechnology

roadmap.title: Capstone & Portfolio
topics: Design and develop a biotechnological solution for crop improvement
